exact_gate_blockers: AGENTS.md requires EXECUTION_CORE_REPAIR_CLOSED_AND_DESIGN_GATE_READY before rich UI expansion
MASTER_PLAN.md still places execution-core repair before basic companion UI
UI_READINESS_SPEC.md is a readiness/spec boundary, not permission to outrun execution-core repair
accepted_findings.additional_refresh_rule: any active-routing effect requires accounts list --json and status --json refresh
